activation_criteria.description: Multiple agents attempting to modify same file/repository
activation_criteria.detection_method: Git status monitoring or chat coordination tracking

activation_criteria.description: Divergent goal interpretation (>2 agents disagreeing on implementation approach)
Coordination timeout (no response to cross-room request after 15 minutes)
Process violation (deviation from established collaboration pattern)

level_0.name: Agent Self-Resolution
actions: Review chat history for coordination attempts
Attempt immediate communication with conflicting agents

level_2.name: Cross-Room Escalation
actions: Formal cross-room request with clear issue description
Include attempted solutions and current state

cross_room_assistance_rate.description: Percentage of governance incidents receiving cross-room assistance

mean_resolution_time.description: Average time from detection to resolution (minutes)

prevention_rate.description: Percentage of potential governance incidents prevented
